description.en: The UUID was generated by the platform in a multiprocessing-safe way.

description.en: Added in version 3.7. safe¶ The UUID was generated by the platform in a multiprocessing-safe way. unsafe¶ The UUID was not generated in a multiprocessing-safe way. unknown¶ The platform does not provide information on whether the UUID was generated safely or not.
